title: Screen Context Analysis Schema
description: Structured analysis of a desktop screenshot with optional accessibility and window metadata. Designed for VLM extraction via xtr from ctx captures.

scene.description: High-level description of what is happening on screen

summary.description: One-sentence summary of the current screen state

activity.description: What the user appears to be doing, e.g. writing code, browsing the web, reading email, editing a document

complexity.description: Visual complexity of the screen layout

focused_app.description: The application that currently has focus

name.description: Application name as visible on screen

state.description: Current state of the app, e.g. editing file main.rs, composing new email, viewing search results

language.description: Programming language if source code is visible, or natural language of text content

key_elements.description: Notable UI elements, text fragments, or data points visible on screen

file_path.description: File path visible in title bar, tab, or breadcrumb if any

url.description: URL visible in browser address bar if applicable

dialogs_open.description: Whether any modal dialog, popup, or overlay is visible

dialog_type.description: Type of dialog if one is open

dialog_message.description: Text content of the dialog if readable

panels_visible.description: Side panels, toolbars, or panes visible in the UI

split_view.description: Whether the screen shows a split or multi-pane layout

tabs_count.description: Number of tabs visible in the focused application

active_tab.description: Label or title of the currently active tab

errors_and_warnings.description: Any error messages, warnings, or notifications visible on screen

source.description: Where the error appears, e.g. terminal, IDE problems panel, browser console, dialog

actionable_items.description: Buttons, links, or interactive elements that appear to need user attention or action

label.description: Text label of the actionable element

appears_urgent.description: Whether this item appears to need immediate attention

visible_windows_count.description: Number of distinct application windows visible

background_apps.description: Applications visible in the background or partially occluded

desktop_visible.description: Whether the desktop background is partially visible

menubar_items.description: Notable items visible in the system menu bar or taskbar

suggestions.description: Contextual suggestions for what an AI agent could help with based on the current screen state
